  "decision": "fail",

  "findings": [
    "Gas flex connector passing through cabinet wall unshielded",
    "Potential abrasion and gas leak hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately",
    "Protect or reroute connector per manufacturer instructions and code",
    "Install listed grommet, shield, or sleeve where connector penetrates cabinet wall"
  ],
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "rationale": "A flexible gas connector routed through a cabinet wall without protection is subject to abrasion and damage, creating a high-risk gas leak hazard. Codes (IPC 504, IRC P2804) and manufacturer instructions require connectors to be installed so they are not subject to damage, including proper support and protection at penetrations.",

    "IRC P2804.1",
    "Manufacturer installation instructions"
  ],
